app.subtitle: U.S. solar opportunity analytics · v2
sidebar.overviewCopy: Rank of U.S. states by weighted solar-development attractiveness.
sidebar.detailCopy: Run deeper state analysis, then inspect structured candidate sites.
filters.title: Filters
filters.strictHint: hide sites that don't clear deterministic rules
methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.body: Macro score blends solar resource, land cost, electricity price, open-land availability, and development friendliness. Run a state analysis to generate current-stage candidate opportunities with deterministic filters.
sites.title: Candidate sites
sites.noneStrict: No generated sites pass the current strict filters.
sites.noneLoose: No sites match the current filters.
footer: v2 · deterministic scoring and filters · Gemini explanation layer · PostgreSQL-first with seed fallback
state.noneSelected: Select a state to inspect macro ranking and run a deeper analysis.
state.analysisUnavailable: Database unavailable — showing seed fallback data.
state.analysisEmpty: Latest analysis completed with no passing candidate sites.
empty.analysis: Run analysis for this state to generate current-stage candidate sites.
